allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:APPDATA\\firebase", "$env:USERPROFILE\\.config\\firebase", "$env:APPDATA\\Roaming\\firebase"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p"; Get-ChildItem $p } })

PowerShell($token = \(Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.config\\configstore\\firebase-tools.json" | ConvertFrom-Json\).tokens.access_token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; $res = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://firestore.googleapis.com/v1/projects/kam-1a8ab/databases/\(default\)/documents/buffs" -Headers $headers; $res.documents | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.name.Split\("/"\)[-1] })
